sections.paragraph: plur (from the sing. שֵׂד, שִׂדָּה a plain, a field, from the root שָׂדַד); hence [Siddim], pr.n. עֵמֶק הַשִּׂדִּים (valley of the plains) the plain of the cities of Sodom and Gomorrha, from the sinking of which, the Dead Sea has come into existence, Gen 14:3, Gen 14:8, 10 2Ki 11:10.
